title: Monolith → Microservices: 8 lessons I learned the hard way
excerpt: Eight hard-won lessons from migrating legacy platforms in banking and telecom — seams before services, why the database is the real monolith, and the governance that makes autonomy survivable.

title: How I launched this site: GitHub Pages, Cloudflare DNS and a custom .lk domain
excerpt: The full walkthrough of shipping this portfolio for $0/month — automatic deployments, free HTTPS, and a custom domain — plus the pitfalls I hit along the way.
